query:
-- Check unmatched Xero billing items
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.amount, bi.billingPlatform, bi.period
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'Xero'
  AND (bi.serviceExternalId IS NULL OR bi.serviceExternalId = '')
  AND bi.amount > 0
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.amount DESC
LIMIT 20;
